title: Quick MBTI-Style Quiz
promise: A two-minute, MBTI-style snapshot of your four preference dimensions. Original items — not the official MBTI.
description: 12 binary-choice items across four dimensions (E/I, S/N, T/F, J/P). Custom scoring determines dominant pole per dimension and constructs a four-letter type code (e.g., INTJ) with a brief description and venture fit. Items are original and not from the official MBTI.
ogDescription: Find your four-letter type. 12 binary choices, ~2 min. Private by design. Not the official MBTI.
